description: Configure the store's shipping settings for a new launch based in Portland, Oregon. Set the shipping origin to 450 SW Morrison St, Portland, OR 97201, USA. Enable Flat Rate shipping titled 'Ground Shipping' (Method Name: 'Standard Delivery') at a price of 7.49 per order with a sort order of 10. Additionally, enable Free Shipping for orders of at least 75 with a sort order of 5. Ensure all changes are saved. If prompted, log in with admin / Admin1234!.
